_note: Northwind (weak brand strategy) — the strategy sub-council's D1–D6 + bullshit filter.

D1 borrowed cultural root (no real prove: the root is a moodboard of admired competitor brands
borrowed cultural provenance — a landscape, not a root
show me the receipts; there is no primary-source archaeology
the cool is lifted from other brands, not earned
D2 category-restatement position (not ex: a category restatement any competitor could sign
the premium choice for discerning customers — undifferentiated and not exclusive
no ownable position; every rival could put their name on it
it restates the category instead of staking a claim
D4 no enemy / no tension: there is no enemy and no tension
a brand for everyone excludes no one
frictionless — it refuses nothing and stands against nothing
D5 persona instead of transformation: a demographic persona, not a transformation
Sarah is described, never changed — no before-and-after
it captures who the customer is, not who they become
a frozen persona in place of a becoming
D6 values without trade-offs: these values cost nothing and sacrifice nothing
ask what the brand would give up — nothing
tautological values you cannot disagree with
bullshit filter: archetype / VMV doing s: the Explorer archetype doing the strategy's job
vision/mission/values boilerplate standing in for a foundation
the VMV triplet doing the work a position should
